disabled_with_access.title: Disabled users with access
disabled_with_access.description: Accounts that appear disabled/inactive while still showing product access signals.

access_without_license_signal.title: Access without clear license signal
access_without_license_signal.description: Accounts with product access signals and explicit license/billing fields showing no license. Suppressed when source files do not expose license fields.

licensed_inactive_or_unused.title: Licensed inactive or unused users
licensed_inactive_or_unused.description: Accounts that appear licensed but inactive, stale, or never active.

source_mismatch_users.title: Source mismatch users
source_mismatch_users.description: Accounts present in one source but absent from another.

notes: Admin Insight Engine v1 is backend/data only. No UI wiring has been performed.
Issue detection is intentionally conservative and based only on fields present in the loaded JSON sources.
If counts are zero, this may mean the environment is healthy or that source files do not yet expose the required signals.
User-level license risk detection is suppressed unless source records expose explicit license or billing-seat fields.
